Package org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.fluxnova

Class FluxnovaFormFieldImpl

java.lang.Object
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.xml.impl.instance.ModelElementInstanceImpl
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.BpmnModelElementInstanceImpl
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.impl.instance.fluxnova.FluxnovaFormFieldImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
BpmnModelElementInstance, FluxnovaFormField, ModelElementInstance
public class FluxnovaFormFieldImpl extends BpmnModelElementInstanceImpl implements FluxnovaFormField
The BPMN formField camunda extension element
Author:
Sebastian Menski
